sentences.target: Ich habe heute eine Menge Arbeit.

translations.de: Ich habe heute eine Menge Arbeit.
translations.en: I have a lot of work today.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi có nhiều việc phải làm.
translations.hi: आज मेरे पास बहुत काम है.
translations.nb: I dag har jeg mye å gjøre.
translations.id: Hari ini saya punya banyak pekerjaan.
translations.sv: I dag har jag mycket jobb.
translations.da: I dag har jeg meget arbejde.
translations.ja: 今日は仕事がたくさんあります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st singular; expresses possession and selects a direct object.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, indicating the time of the event.
Indefinite article agreeing with ‘Menge’ (feminine singular accusative) as the direct object NP.
Noun (feminine singular) meaning ‘amount/lot’; head of the object NP; serves as a quantity noun taking a bare nominal complement.
Mass noun (feminine singular) specifying the content of the quantity (‘eine Menge Arbeit’); nominal complement to ‘Menge’.

sentences.target: Die Menge klatscht vor der Bühne.

translations.de: Die Menge klatscht vor der Bühne.
translations.en: The crowd is clapping in front of the stage.
translations.es: El público aplaude frente al escenario.
translations.fr: La foule applaudit devant la scène.
translations.it: La folla applaude davanti al palco.
translations.ko: 무대 앞에서 관객들이 박수를 치고 있어요.
translations.yue: 舞台前面嘅人群喺度拍手。
translations.pt: A multidão aplaude em frente ao palco.
translations.vi: Đám đông đang vỗ tay trước sân khấu.
translations.nl: Het publiek klapt voor het podium.
translations.hu: A tömeg tapsol a színpad előtt.
translations.hi: मंच के सामने भीड़ ताली बजा रही है.
translations.el: Το πλήθος χειροκροτά μπροστά στη σκηνή.
translations.id: Kerumunan bertepuk tangan di depan panggung.
translations.ja: ステージの前で観客が拍手しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun ‘Menge’.
Noun (feminine singular) meaning ‘crowd/mass’; subject of the clause, controls singular verb agreement.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd singular; intransitive predicate describing the action performed by the subject.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative PP modifying the clause.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of the prepositional object ‘Bühne’.
Noun (feminine singular); object of the preposition ‘vor’ forming the locative PP.

translations.en: We need a lot of water.
translations.fr: Nous avons besoin de beaucoup d’eau.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần rất nhiều nước.
translations.ar: نحن بحاجة إلى الكثير من الماء.
translations.da: Vi har brug for en masse vand.
translations.ja: たくさんの水が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st plural; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of the object noun ‘Menge’.
Noun (feminine singular) meaning ‘amount/lot’; head of the direct object NP; quantity noun taking a bare nominal complement.
Mass noun (neuter); bare nominal complement to ‘Menge’ specifying the substance (‘eine Menge Wasser’).

sentences.target: Vor dem Laden stehen schon eine Menge Leute.
sentences.reading: /foːɐ̯ deːm ˈlaːdn̩ ˈʃteːən ʃoːn ˈaɪ̯nə ˈmɛŋə ˈlɔʏ̯tə/

translations.de: Vor dem Laden stehen schon eine Menge Leute.
translations.ipa: /foːɐ̯ deːm ˈlaːdn̩ ˈʃteːən ʃoːn ˈaɪ̯nə ˈmɛŋə ˈlɔʏ̯tə/
translations.en: There are already a lot of people in front of the shop.
translations.es: Ya hay mucha gente frente a la tienda.
translations.fr: Il y a déjà beaucoup de monde devant le magasin.
translations.it: Davanti al negozio c’è già molta gente.
translations.ko: 가게 앞에 벌써 사람이 많이 서 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 店门口已经站了很多人。
translations.yue: 舖頭門口已經有好多人喺度企。
translations.ru: Перед магазином уже стоит много людей.
translations.pt: Já há muita gente em frente à loja.
translations.he: כבר עומדים הרבה אנשים מול החנות.
translations.tr: Dükkanın önünde şimdiden bir sürü insan var.
translations.vi: Trước cửa hàng đã có rất nhiều người đứng.
translations.ar: هناك بالفعل الكثير من الناس أمام المتجر.
translations.nl: Er staan al veel mensen voor de winkel.
translations.uk: Перед магазином вже стоїть багато людей.
translations.hu: A bolt előtt már rengeteg ember áll.
translations.hi: दुकान के सामने पहले से ही बहुत लोग खड़े हैं.
translations.pl: Przed sklepem stoi już mnóstwo ludzi.
translations.el: Μπροστά στο κατάστημα στέκονται ήδη πολλοί άνθρωποι.
translations.nb: Det står allerede mange mennesker foran butikken.
translations.id: Sudah ada banyak orang berdiri di depan toko.
translations.sv: Det står redan många människor framför butiken.
translations.ro: În fața magazinului stau deja mulți oameni.
translations.cs: Před obchodem už stojí spousta lidí.
translations.da: Der står allerede en masse mennesker foran butikken.
translations.fi: Kaupan edessä seisoo jo paljon ihmisiä.
translations.ja: 店の前にはもう大勢の人が立っています。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing the dative; heads a fronted locative PP setting the scene.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of ‘Laden’ as the object of ‘vor’.
Noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition ‘vor’ within the PP.
Finite main verb, present indicative plural (3rd person); predicate of the clause, agreeing in number with the subject NP.
Adverb indicating temporal aspect (‘already’), modifying the clause.
Indefinite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of ‘Menge’ within the subject NP.
Noun (feminine singular) functioning as a quantity noun in the subject; complemented by ‘Leute’. Despite singular form, the plural complement drives plural verb agreement.
Plural noun serving as the bare nominal complement to ‘Menge’; semantically prominent plural entity controlling the clause’s plural agreement.

jp: Ich habe heute eine Menge Arbeit.
Die Menge klatscht vor der Bühne.
Vor dem Laden stehen schon eine Menge Leute.
fu: /foːɐ̯ deːm ˈlaːdn̩ ˈʃteːən ʃoːn ˈaɪ̯nə ˈmɛŋə ˈlɔʏ̯tə/
de: Ich habe heute eine Menge Arbeit.
Die Menge klatscht vor der Bühne.
Vor dem Laden stehen schon eine Menge Leute.
ipa: /foːɐ̯ deːm ˈlaːdn̩ ˈʃteːən ʃoːn ˈaɪ̯nə ˈmɛŋə ˈlɔʏ̯tə/
en: I have a lot of work today.
The crowd is clapping in front of the stage.
We need a lot of water.
There are already a lot of people in front of the shop.
